unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What's the weather like?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：we(我们)+ath(啊，太)+er(人) -> 我们人类啊，特别在乎每天的天气(weather)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's sunny, sunny, sunny.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：sun(太阳)+ny -> 太阳出来了，今天是个阳光充足的(sunny)日子。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The clouds go by, by, by.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：cl(窗帘)+oud(偶的) -> 窗帘拉开，看到了天空中偶的云(cloud)朵。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: prep. 经过; 靠近; 乘(车/船等)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The clouds go by, by, by.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：by(表示在……旁) -> 经过(by)你身旁。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's cloudy, cloudy, cloudy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：cloud(云)+y(形容词后缀) -> 云很多，就是多云的(cloudy)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The wind blows around, around, around.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：win(赢)+d(的) -> 赢得胜利，风(wind)在呼啸庆祝。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The wind blows around, around, around.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：b(不)+low(低) -> 风吹(blow)得高高的，一点都不低。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's windy, windy, windy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：wind(风)+y(形容词后缀) -> 风很大，就是风大的(windy)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The rain comes down, down, down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：r(人)+ain(看作pain痛苦) -> 人在雨(rain)中奔跑，有些痛苦。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's rainy, rainy, rainy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：rain(雨)+y(形容词后缀) -> 下着雨，就是多雨的(rainy)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The snow dances around, around, around.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s(蛇)+now(现在) -> 蛇现在(now)看见下雪(snow)了，赶紧去冬眠。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's snowy, snowy, snowy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：snow(雪)+y(形容词后缀) -> 到处是雪，就是下雪的(snowy)季节。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In any weather, we have fun.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：an(一个)+y -> 任何一个(any)苹果，我都喜欢吃。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：c(吃)+old(老的人) -> 老人吃冰激凌，感觉非常冷(cold)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：o(圆圈)+r(人) -> 这个人或者(or)那个圆圈，二选一。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Enjoy them all!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：en(使)+joy(欢乐) -> 带来欢乐，享受(enjoy)其中。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What's the weather like in your weather diary?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：di(弟)+ary(名词后缀) -> 弟弟每天都在写日记(diary)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Liu Fei is a teacher at a children's home in Sanya.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：teach(教)+er(人) -> 教书的人就是教师，老师(teacher)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Does it taste like ice cream?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：t(太)+as(像)+te(特) -> 这个味道太像特别的巧克力的味道(taste)了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Does it taste like ice cream?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ice(冰)+cream(奶油) -> 冰冰的奶油就是冰激凌(ice cream)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The children here want to see real snow.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：re(热)+al(所有) -> 热爱所有真的(real)东西。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Two days later, Liu Fei gets a big box.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：late(迟的)+r -> 迟一点也就是之后，以后(later)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Do I need my coat or not?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：c(穿)+oat(看作boat船) -> 穿着外套(coat)去划船。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Come on! Let's turn on the TV.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：t(头)+urn(看作burn燃烧) -> 头发要烧着了，赶紧转身(turn)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Come on! Let's turn on the TV.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: turn(转动)+on(在……上面/开启) -> 转动使它运转也就是打开(turn on)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Come on! Let's turn on the TV.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Television的简写，T和V是大写字母代表电视(TV)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Let's watch the report today!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：re(阿姨)+port(港口) -> 阿姨在港口做关于天气的报道(report)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The sun comes up, up, up.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: comes(来)+up(向上) -> 向上来，也就是升起(comes up)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The clouds go by, by, by.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: go(走)+by(在……旁边) -> 走过(go by)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The wind blows around, around, around.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: blow(吹)+around(周围) -> 吹向四周(blow around)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The rain comes down, down, down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: come(来)+down(向下) -> 降落，下来(come down)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The snow dances around, around, around.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dance(跳舞)+around(周围) -> 围绕周围起舞(dance around)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In any weather, we have fun.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: have(有)+fun(乐趣) -> 拥有乐趣也就是玩得开心(have fun)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We can go out to play.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: go(走)+out(向外) -> 走出去(go out)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've got a good idea.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: good(好的)+idea(主意) -> 好主意(good idea)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：wa(哇)+rm(热水) -> 哇，这盆热水好温暖(warm)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：coo(咕咕声)+l(冰激凌) -> 鸟儿在凉爽(cool)的树荫下咕咕叫。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：ho(火)+t(桶) -> 像火桶一样热(hot)。
